name: HOOPS SCOUTING USA
summary: . Corporate History Hoops Scouting USA was incorporated on October 31, 2016 under the laws of the State of Wyoming. We offer a basketball website for high school basketball players with aspirations of playing post-secondary basketball. Our website www.hoopsscoutingusa.com (the Website) will be the main hub and we are developing an app that will work in unison with the Website. We are in the development stage, and have not realized any revenues from our operations. Jamie Oei has served as our Pre...
